attributes.db.statement:
SELECT users.id, users.email, users.hashed_password, users.display_name, users.created_at, users.is_active 
FROM users 
WHERE users.email = $1::VARCHAR /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-531ec6228d7b46cf7d4faec7dbc8bdef-ae28fcf0e06e0218-03'*/
